sample_prompts: give this segment chain a cleaner upward arc
bend this ordered chain into a smoother curve
raise the creature tail into a cleaner arc
reshape the tail curve to better match the side reference silhouette
bend the neck or spine chain into a softer creature profile
ułóż ten łańcuch segmentów w łuk
wygnij ten łańcuch w bardziej płynną krzywiznę
description: Bounded macro that adjusts an ordered chain of existing segment objects into a planar arc by applying deterministic per-segment placement (and optional rotation) around one explicit rotation axis.
